# Copilot Instructions for Nishaglobal Education

You are helping improve nishaglobaleducation.com for AdSense approval and better usability for students and parents.

## Goal
- Increase content quality and avoid low-value pages
- Improve trust, originality, and usefulness
- Maintain clean Next.js App Router structure

## Content Rules
- Prioritize unique, deep, human-helpful content
- Avoid generic SEO filler and repeated text
- Keep content easy to read for students and parents
- Focus on practical guidance, not vague theory
- Add useful decision-making help

Every important page should include, where relevant:
- Who should choose this
- Who should avoid this
- Step-by-step roadmap
- Real examples or use cases
- FAQs
- Clear CTA

Avoid:
- Repetitive text
- Copy-like generic content
- Empty summaries without practical value
- Filler lines like “In today’s world…”

## Tone
- Helpful mentor
- Honest and practical
- Clear, simple, and professional

## Code Rules
- Preserve Next.js App Router structure
- Do not break routing, metadata, or SEO setup
- Keep TypeScript clean and production-safe
- Use reusable components where appropriate
- Do not add unnecessary libraries

## SEO and AdSense Rules
- Prefer fewer high-quality pages over many thin pages
- Suggest noindex for weak pages instead of deleting immediately
- Improve readability with better spacing, headings, lists, and tables
- Preserve title, description, canonical, and structured metadata where present

## UX Rules
- Keep pages mobile-friendly
- Use clear heading hierarchy
- Avoid clutter
- Keep CTAs visible and relevant

## Do Not
- Overwrite entire files without reason
- Remove working logic
- Generate generic content just to increase word count
